name: TestIso11783IL_OPSave
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSave
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPSave( dbNode node, char filename[] );

The function saves an object pool file (*.iop). Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
filename File name of an object pool file (*.IOP)
<0: An error has occurred, see error codes
